CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-12-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff Financial Pacific Leasing Inc.
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up,
on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Crepe Chocolat, A California Corporation DBA Bio aka
Bio Cafe and Sylvia R. Krawec, an individual.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against
Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Damages: $29,331.01
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,211.04
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $549.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $33,916.05

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2016 Continued To Aug-24-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Mar-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF FINANCIAL PACIFIC LEASING, INC.'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is off calendar. Defaults were entered against Crepe O Chocolat and Sylvia Krawec as requested by plaintiff on February 24, 2016 which render this application moot.
